title: AI chip demand stays strong, but component shortages emerge as next challenge: Nomura
description: The artificial intelligence (AI) boom is entering a new phase where the biggest challenge is no longer demand for AI chips but shortages of critical components needed to build AI infrastructure, according to a Nomura Report, which said supply constraints across the hardware ecosystem are likely to intensify through 2027 even as AI investment remains strong.
content:

title: Trust, Technology and the Human Touch: Doctors Reflect the Changing Face of Indian Healthcare
description: New Delhi [India], July 2: Healthcare continues to evolve rapidly with advances in artificial intelligence, digital diagnostics, minimally invasive procedures and data-driven clinical decision-making. Despite these technological developments, the doctor-patient relationship remains central to medical practice, with trust, communication and ethical care continuing to shape patient outcomes.
